description_long: This object is a cylindrical traffic cone with a two-tone color scheme, featuring a bright orange upper half and a white lower half. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with no visible textures, patterns, or reflective stripes. The top of the cone is flat and solid, lacking any pointed or hollow features, and the base is also flat, providing stability but without any additional reinforcement or ribbing. There are no visible logos, text, or markings on any side of the object. The cone appears to be made primarily of plastic, likely polyethylene or PVC, which is common for traffic cones due to its durability and flexibility. The overall condition of the object is new, with no signs of wear, fading, or damage.
description: A cylindrical traffic cone with a bright orange upper half and a white lower half, featuring a smooth, flat top and base with no visible markings or reflective stripes.
description_view_0: The cone is seen from the front, showing a clear division between the orange upper and white lower halves, with a smooth, flat top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cylindrical shape and the seamless transition between the orange and white sections, with no additional features visible.
description_view_2: From this angle, the flatness of the top and the uniformity of the color separation are evident, with no markings or textures.
description_view_3: This view again shows the two-tone color scheme and the smooth, unmarked surface, emphasizing the object's clean and new appearance.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the object.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, solid, and orange in color, with no distinctive features or attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is flat, circular, and white, with no visible reinforcement, ribbing, or additional stability features.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
